titleStmt.title: SII 5.751: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 751. (A.R. No. 187 of 1895). The word tulyam is engraved on the left margin of this inscription. ON THE INNER SIDE OF THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . tāmpirā yardekṣiṇe tire koṭitittasya paścime . Etat
vāmaṉarūpeṇa dvārakānāthaśāsanam . śāśvadam param . śakābdam 1
5 10 14- ṉmel cellāniṉṟa kollam 7 100 6 10t varuṣam kāttikai mātam 10 6 pū
rvva pakṣattu tiṟitikaiyum cūlayoga mum kuruvāra mum gaja kara ṇamum peṟṟa
mulattu ṉāḷ Āyiratteṇmaṉ pantalkiḷ śrīraṅgadevamahārājāvi
ṉ kāriyattukku kaṟttarāṉa viśvanātha kṛṣṇa ppa virappa ṉāyakkar piṭatti liru
ntu ṉāmum nam peṇṭukaḷoṭuṅ kūṭi Ārātaṉaikoṇṭu Irukkayil nam viṭṭil A
ṟai kaṇakku palarum Eḻutipoṭṭu pokaiyil nam maṭapati cīvaiṣṇavarum mahā- sabhai yu
paṭṭamum namaṭiyāṉ viśvanāthakṛṣṇa ppa virappaṉāyakkar Uttarappaṭi nam Aṭiyāṉ kāḷa
ttiyappaṉum nam Aṟcakarkaḷum nam vīṭṭilk kāriyañcevār kaṟaṇikkar Uḻpaṭṭa Aṉaittu
kottum kūṭi nam Aṭiyāḷukku malaimāṇikkam vīrarākavaṉaik koṇṭu namakku A
ṟṟaippaṭiyum Aṟaiccilavum naṭakkumpaṭikku pātakāṇikkaiyāka nam Aṟaiyil
Oṭukka kkaṟpitta � 5 100 Intappaṇam Aññūṟum Oṭukkivittukkoṇṭu paṇṭuṭaiyārum pa
ḻamperaiyum taviṟttu cipaṇṭārak kaṇakku kāṇiyāṭcaiyāka kkaṭṭaḷai Iṭave
ṇumeṉṟu nammuṭaṉ collukaiyil ṉāmu(mu)m ḷu varuṣam 6 10 9 varuṣam kārttikaiṭṭa mutalukkup
paṇṭuḷāraiyum paḻam peraiyum taviṟttu nam viṭṭil Aṟṟaipaṭiyum Aṟaiccilavum Eḻutiva
rum cipaṇṭārak kaṇakku kāṇiyāṭcaiyākak kkaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭikku nam Aṟcakar Aḻakiyappaṉ
Aḻakiyamaṇavāḻapaṭṭar tāṉakkaṇakku kkuṭuttapaṭiyum capaikkaṇakku teṉṉavaṉ muventarve
ḻāṉ kaṇakku kkoṭuttapaṭiyum tirtthaprasāda mum Uṭamaiyum maṟṟum Eppayappaṭṭa cuvantiraṅkaḷum
ṉām kaṟpittapaṭikkup paṟṟikkoṇṭu Iṉṉāḻ mutalukku cantatippiṟavecame kallilum cempilum veṭṭi kaiyāṇṭu ko
ḷḷuvārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu nammaṭiyāṉ tirumalaimāṇikkam virarākavaṉukku paṇṭu
ṭaiyāṉum paḻamperaiyum tavirttu nammaṟaikkaṇakku kāṇiyāṭcai kuṭuttamaikku nam ceṉāpatikku
m Okkum Aṟuḻāl tirumantiraolai ṉāyakamśubhamastu tiruvāymakiḻntu Aruḷiṉa
paṭikku nampu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapaṭṭar nampu karuṇaākarapaṭṭar malainampi Aḻakiyappaṉ Eḻuttu civaiṣṇavar tiru
maṅkaiyāḻit tātar Eḻuttu mācapai muttapaṇṇai Eḻuttu paṭṭarkaḷ Aḻakiyappaṉ Eḻuttu kali Eḻuttu
cikāriyam mayileṟumperumāḷ Eḻuttu kaṭaikūṭṭu koneriyappaṉ Eḻuttu kaṭaikūṭṭu cevvantiyappar
tittayappiḷḷai mutalukkum mayileṟumperumāḷ tāṉakkaṇakku Aḻakiyamaṇavāḻa paṭṭar Aḻakiyappaṉ Eḻuttu
nayiṉākkai mutaliyār mutalukku Ellāntiṟappiṉār Eḻuttu capaikaṇakku teṉṉavaṉ muventarveḷārukku mutalinayiṉāṉpiḷḷai Eḻuttu
Āṇṭaperumāpiḷḷai Eḻuttu Attān tirumalai kaṇakku paṇṭārattukku virarākavaṉ Eḻuttu
kaṭaikūṭṭuc cevvantiyappaṉ Eḻuttu tirumalai Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.751 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
